name: Persimmon Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the persimmon pulp, butter, sugar, soda, milk, flour, vanilla, baking powder, egg, and spices together in a bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, beat the eggs with sugar until smooth. Gradually add the sherry.
3. Just before serving, stir in the whipped cream.
4. Grease a coffee can and loosely cover it with waxed paper.
5. Place the can on a grate in a Dutch oven and steam for 3 hours, keeping an eye on the water level to maintain about 1/3 depth of the can.
6. Serve hot with the sauce or whipped cream.
